title: senecio notonioides
intro: Senecio notonioides, also known as Noton's ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Senecio notonioides can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
